description: RAG Web Browser - Web scraping tool for RAG pipelines. Queries Google Search or scrapes URLs directly, returns content as Markdown. | RAG 网页浏览器 - RAG 管道的网页抓取工具。支持 Google 搜索或直接抓取 URL，返回 Markdown 格式内容。

properties.title: Search Query or URL | 搜索关键词或 URL
properties.name: query
properties.description: Enter Google Search keywords or a URL to scrape directly. Examples: 'web scraping tools' or 'https://example.com'. | 输入 Google 搜索关键词或直接抓取的 URL。例如：'网页抓取工具' 或 'https://example.com'

properties.title: Max Results | 最大结果数
properties.name: maxResults
properties.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-100). Ignored if query is a URL. | 返回的最大搜索结果数（1-100）。如果 query 是 URL 则忽略。

properties.title: Output Format | 输出格式
properties.name: outputFormat
properties.description: The format of the output content. | 输出内容的格式。

properties.title: Scraping Tool | 抓取工具
properties.name: scrapingTool
properties.description: Raw HTTP is fast but cannot handle JavaScript. Browser mode handles dynamic content but is slower. | Raw HTTP 快速但无法处理 JavaScript。浏览器模式可处理动态内容但较慢。

properties.title: Request Timeout (secs) | 请求超时(秒)
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a request to complete (1-300). | 请求完成的最大等待时间（秒，1-300）。

properties.title: Max Retries | 最大重试
properties.name: maxRequestRetries
properties.description: Number of retry attempts for failed requests. | 失败请求的重试次数。

properties.title: Concurrency | 并发数
properties.name: desiredConcurrency
properties.description: Number of parallel scraping operations. Higher = faster but more resources. | 并行抓取操作数。越高越快但消耗更多资源。

properties.title: Dynamic Content Wait (secs) | 动态内容等待(秒)
properties.name: dynamicContentWaitSecs
properties.description: Time to wait for dynamic page content (browser mode only). | 等待动态页面内容的时间（仅浏览器模式）。

properties.title: Remove Cookie Warnings | 移除 Cookie 警告
properties.name: removeCookieWarnings
properties.description: Automatically remove cookie warning banners from pages. | 自动移除页面的 Cookie 警告横幅。

properties.title: Debug Mode | 调试模式
properties.name: debugMode
properties.description: Enable debug logging and performance metrics. | 启用调试日志和性能指标。
